title: Investigations may be private
doc_html:
§1571.  Investigations may be private

All investigations held by or under the direction of the fire marshal or his authorized representative may, in his discretion, be private.  Persons other than those required to be present by the provisions of this Part may be excluded from the place where the investigation is held.
